## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan upcoming events for GrowthX, including breakfasts, dinners, and conferences.](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current event planning is ambitious and potentially over-budget; need to reassess overall strategy and ROI](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2614.0)
  - [CMO Breakfast (Aug 12) and Madrona Dinner (date TBD) are next immediate priorities](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)
  - [Team roles and responsibilities for event planning need clearer definition](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [Budget concerns raised; need to establish clear budgets for each event type](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)

## Topics

### Event Calendar and Planning

  - [Multiple events planned: CMO breakfasts, partner dinners, conference after-parties](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Concern raised about the volume of events and team capacity to execute](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
  - [Need for better process: monthly planning meetings, clear owner for each event](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Jason to create a Linear project or Slack channel with event checklists](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2756.0)

### Budget Concerns

  - [Current spending potentially exceeds 10% of revenue marketing budget](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
  - [High-end dinners (e.g., Quince) could cost $25,000+](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)
  - [CMO breakfasts estimated at $3,000-$7,000](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2468.0)
  - [AI Growth Summit venue quoted at \~$160,000](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
  - [Team to reassess overall event strategy and budget allocation](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)

### Venue Selection

  - [Exploring high-end options like Quince for partner dinners](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Office space available for hosting larger breakfasts (15+ people)](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Marissa working on securing venues, especially for Madrona dinner](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Guest List and Invitations

  - [Focus on AI founders, Series A-B companies for partner dinners](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Need system for tracking valuable prospects and converting to leads](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Marcel currently handling much of the networking and invitations](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Team to develop more systematic approach to guest list curation](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)

### Event ROI and Strategy

  - [Lack of clear data on event effectiveness in generating leads/closes](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2622.0)
  - [Anecdotal evidence of in-person meetings accelerating sales process (e.g., Tavern deal)](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2664.0)
  - [Need to balance event frequency with team capacity and client focus](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2643.0)
  - [Suggestion to potentially reduce number of events while maintaining lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/zZBZV6sUH-Ug5QCbUyWMWND1Sh34hx4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
